name: Sonic AI: Intelligent Equalizer
description: A professional-grade parametric equalizer that uses Gemini AI to fine-tune your sound based on your personal hearing preferences and music taste.

A professional-grade parametric equalizer with on-device math (Kalman, polynomial regression, mutual information, dynamic-Q optimisation, parabolic peak detection) that fine-tunes 10 EQ bands to your personal hearing preferences. Zero external AI dependencies.
